# Schoolify

> Cloud-based School Management System (SaaS) for Pakistani schools and educational institutions.

Schoolify is a complete school management platform built for Pakistani schools. It automates fee collection, attendance tracking, parent communication, result card generation, payroll management, and administrative workflows — all accessible from any device via the cloud.

## Product

- [Homepage](https://schoolify.online/)
- [Features](https://schoolify.online/features/)
- [Pricing](https://schoolify.online/pricing/)
- [Contact](https://schoolify.online/contact/)
- [Login / App](https://app.schoolify.online/)

## Core Features

- **Fee Management**: Automated fee collection, receipts, reminders, and reporting
- **Attendance System**: Auto attendance with SMS/WhatsApp alerts to parents
- **Result Cards**: Generate professional result cards and progress reports
- **Payroll Management**: Staff salary processing and HR records
- **Parent Communication**: WhatsApp integration, SMS alerts, parent portal
- **Multi-language Support**: English, Urdu, Sindhi — with RTL layout
- **AI Exam Generator**: Generate exam papers in Urdu, Sindhi, and English

## Target Users

Schools, colleges, and academies in Pakistan — particularly in Islamabad, Karachi, Lahore, and other urban centers.

## Company

- **Website**: https://schoolify.online
- **Email**: support.schoolify@gmail.com
- **Phone**: +92 301 8981055
- **Location**: Islamabad, Pakistan

## Pricing

Subscription plans available monthly (1, 3, 6, and 12-month options). Contact for institutional pricing.
